title: The First Idea
description: A recovered record from the moment learning first became visible.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: Before there is a world, there is a wish.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: I want learning to become visible.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: Then knowledge needs a form.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: Can such a form be shaped?

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: There is an ancient tool called C. It may shape the first page.

projectStage.title: Prototype v0: Question Only
projectStage.caption: A recovered fragment from the time when the world was only one question and one answer.

title: The First Structure
description: A recovered record from the time questions first gathered into topics.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: One question shines, but many questions scatter.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: A learner may lose the path.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: Then give knowledge a structure.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: Let fractions stand with fractions, and shapes with shapes.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: The first groups appear. The page begins to remember its order.

projectStage.title: Prototype v1: Topic Structure
projectStage.caption: A recovered fragment from the time when questions first gathered into topics.

title: The First World
description: A recovered record from the age when the first map and towers appeared.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: A list is useful, but it is not a world.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: I want students to explore.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: Then give knowledge places.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: Let each topic rise as a tower.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: Six towers stand. The first map opens.

projectStage.title: Prototype v2: The First Map
projectStage.caption: A living fragment from the time when the six towers first rose.

title: The First Rules
description: A recovered record from the age when challenge, HP, and rewards took shape.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: A world without risk feels empty.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: Then let challenge enter, but do not let it crush the traveler.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: There shall be health, recovery, and reward.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: Seal Energy will rise with focus. Fragments will mark each victory.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: And the world must remember what has been won.

projectStage.title: Prototype v3: Rules of Challenge
projectStage.caption: A recovered fragment from the time when HP, Seal Energy, combos, and rewards became rules.

title: The First Journey
description: A recovered record from the age when travelers first approached the gate.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: The world stands, yet it is silent.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: A world begins when travelers arrive.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: Then let names be spoken at the gate.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: Let a team enter together, and let Sage Tong greet them.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: The first travelers approach.

projectStage.title: Prototype v4: The First Travelers
projectStage.caption: A recovered fragment from the time when travelers first spoke their names at the gate.

title: The Complete Prototype
description: A recovered record from the current era, where the world can be explored.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: The map opens. The towers answer. The records awaken.

dialogue.speaker: G
dialogue.text: The prototype can now be explored.

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: Then... is the world complete?

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: G?

dialogue.speaker: T
dialogue.text: The record ends before the answer is given.

projectStage.title: Prototype v5: The Complete Prototype
projectStage.caption: A recovered fragment from the current era. The world can be explored, but one question remains.
